gear_crafting.source: Last War: Survival - Gear Crafting Guide. Leveling strategy credits: SHADOWSTRIKE1 on Reddit
core_rules: Only care about UR gear — do not invest in lower rarity gear
Always level gear in 10 level increments
Always buy Blueprints whenever you can
Gear is crafted in the Gear Factory

priority_order: ALL gear to level 10 upon creation
notes: Attack heroes (Kim/Stet) get gun and data chip priority
Defense heroes (Williams/Murphy) get radar and armor priority
Marshall gets gun and data chip for support/buff role
Always level to the next 10-level milestone, never stop mid-increment

strategic_notes: UR gear only — never waste resources on Epic or lower rarity
Blueprints are the key bottleneck — buy every time they appear in any store
Ceramic and Ore are the main crafting materials — farm consistently
Gold costs scale heavily at star levels — prepare reserves before pushing to 1-star+
Mythic Blueprints are rare — required only for 4-star to 5-star upgrade
Concentrate gear upgrades on main squad heroes first, never spread across benched heroes
Attack heroes should have gun and chip prioritised; Defense heroes should have radar and armor prioritised
